home.heroTitle: Modern reconciliation operations for every tenant
home.heroSubtitle: Monitor exceptions, resolve incidents, and keep payment flows trusted in real time.

scope.label: Current scope: M-Pesa / Daraja only
scope.detail: PesaGuard currently reconciles only M-Pesa / Daraja transactions; other payment rails are outside pilot scope.

statusPage.title: Reliable, transparent operations for every pilot customer
statusPage.summary: PesaGuard is operating normally, with service monitoring, backup automation, retention enforcement, and incident response controls active across the platform. Tenant locale preferences are persisted and alert text is localized for pilot customers.

highlights.title: Operational transparency
highlights.body: A consistent status experience ensures pilot stakeholders always understand service health.

highlights.title: Governance readiness
highlights.body: Backup automation, retention enforcement, and response workflows are documented and active.

highlights.title: Customer confidence
highlights.body: The experience is designed for investor, compliance, and pilot-customer review.

postureItems: Daily backup automation enabled and verified
Restore validation is prepared for pilot environment testing
Incident response workflow remains active for critical events
Support and status communications are synchronized for customers

supportPage.title: Fast, expert support for every rollout stage
supportPage.summary: Use the pilot support workspace to raise incidents, review status updates, and coordinate onboarding with the PesaGuard team. We also validate localized alerting and customer-facing messaging during pilot scope reviews.

highlights.title: Fast triage
highlights.body: Every report is routed through a defined support workflow with clear ownership.

highlights.title: Transparent escalation
highlights.body: Critical incidents receive immediate attention and customer-visible updates.

highlights.title: Operational continuity
highlights.body: The support model is aligned with incident response and reporting standards.

reportItems: Time of incident and affected workflow

settings.title: Settings and configuration
settings.subtitle: Manage alert channels, incident thresholds, and operational policies for your tenant.

sections.userLocaleHint: Overrides the tenant default for your browser session. Alerts sent to you will use this language when configured.
sections.channelsHint: Configure where incident notifications are sent.
sections.warningThresholdHint: Discrepancies below this threshold trigger a warning.
sections.criticalThresholdHint: Discrepancies above this threshold trigger a critical alert.

landing.title: Mission control for M-Pesa money movement
landing.summary: PesaGuard watches every transaction, surfaces mismatches early, and gives SACCOs and fintechs a calm, precise control room for reconciliation.
landing.problemBody: Manual reconciliation is slow, error-prone, and hard to audit. Teams discover mismatches hours or days later — when recovery is costly and trust is already damaged.
landing.solutionBody: PesaGuard ingests Daraja callbacks, matches transactions in near real time, and routes anomalies to the right people with clear severity and SLA context.

steps.title: Connect Daraja
steps.body: Securely link your M-Pesa credentials and webhook endpoints.

steps.title: Watch the stream
steps.body: Transactions flow into a live dashboard with match-rate and health signals.

steps.title: Resolve exceptions
steps.body: Unmatched pairs, duplicates, and anomalies are flagged for fast action.

trust: Kenya data residency options for pilot tenants

pricing.title: Pilot-friendly tiers
pricing.summary: Start with a focused pilot, then expand as your transaction volume and team grow.

tiers.name: Pilot
tiers.summary: For your first live tenant validating reconciliation workflows.

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.summary: For 2–4 tenants with reporting and team workflows.

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.summary: For multi-tenant operations with admin tooling.

faq.a: PesaGuard is invite-only during pilot. Contact us to scope a pilot for your organization.
M-Pesa / Daraja only during the current pilot scope.

about.title: Why PesaGuard exists
about.summary: Financial operators deserve the same real-time visibility that engineers get from production monitoring.
about.missionBody: Give every SACCO and fintech a trustworthy control room for payment reconciliation — calm under pressure, precise by design.
about.whyBody: M-Pesa volume keeps growing, but reconciliation tooling has not kept pace. Teams need live signals, not end-of-day spreadsheets.
about.founderBody: We built PesaGuard after watching finance teams firefight mismatches with incomplete data. The product exists to put operators back in control.

blog.title: Product updates
blog.summary: Launch notes, pilot milestones, and operational improvements.

contact.title: Request a demo
contact.summary: Tell us about your reconciliation workflow and we will scope a pilot.
contact.name: Name
contact.sent: Request received. We will respond within one business day.
contact.altBody: Reach the pilot team directly for onboarding or security questions.

security.title: Your transaction data, handled with care
security.summary: Plain-language explanation of how PesaGuard protects customer and payer data during the pilot.

sections.title: Encryption
sections.body: Data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Credentials are stored masked and never shown in full after setup.

sections.title: Access control
sections.body: Role-based access limits who can view transactions, change settings, or export audit logs.

sections.title: Audit logging
sections.body: Every significant action — match, resolve, settings change — is recorded with timestamp and actor.

sections.title: Data residency
sections.body: Pilot tenants can configure deployment, backup, and log regions. Cross-border transfer is off by default.

maintenance.title: Scheduled maintenance
maintenance.summary: PesaGuard is temporarily unavailable while we apply updates. Check status for ETA.

auth.signupSummary: PesaGuard is invite-only during pilot. Submit your details and we will review your request.
auth.signupSubmitted: Request submitted. We will email you when your account is ready.
auth.forgotSummary: Enter your email and we will send a reset link if an account exists.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
auth.resetSummary: Use at least 8 characters with a mix of letters and numbers.
auth.twoFactorSummary: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.summary: Find, understand, and act on any transaction in seconds.
transactions.search: Search by transaction ID or amount
transactions.emptyMessage: Transactions will appear here as they come in.
transactions.panelNoActionNeeded: This transaction matched cleanly — no action needed.

reconciliation.title: Match exceptions
reconciliation.summary: Review unmatched pairs, confirm suggested matches, and keep your ledger aligned.
reconciliation.noUnmatched: No unmatched items — your reconciliation is clean.
reconciliation.emptyMessage: No unmatched pairs today. PesaGuard is watching the stream.

anomalies.title: Alerts & exceptions
anomalies.summary: Flagged items requiring review, with acknowledge and resolve actions.
anomalies.emptyMessage: Your reconciliation is clean. PesaGuard continues monitoring in the background.

sections.title: Getting started

docs.retryBody: Failed deliveries are retried with exponential backoff up to 24 hours. Respond with HTTP 200 to acknowledge receipt.
docs.signatureBody: Verify the X-PesaGuard-Signature header using your tenant webhook secret and the raw request body.

Operational metrics for dashboard and health views.
Mark an anomaly as resolved with an operator note.

glossaryTerms.definition: The process of confirming that every payment received matches your internal records.
A severity signal indicating how urgently an exception needs review.
Linking a payment to its corresponding internal record.
Processing the same webhook twice without creating duplicate records.

errors.notFoundBody: This route does not exist. Check the URL or return to the dashboard.
errors.serverBody: An unexpected error occurred. Retry or check the status page for ongoing incidents.
